title: COMMUNITY MEAL - 211info
text: FREE ON THE OUTSIDE COMMUNITY MEAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community meal twice a week followed by a church service or Celebrate Recovery, 12-step meeting, in which attendance is not required to obtain a meal. 529 Molalla Avenue Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Meal: Thursday 5:15pm, Sunday 5pm Celebrate Recovery: Thursday 6:30pm Worship Service: Sunday 6pm Email (503) 383-1834 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 383-1834 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus 32 stops at 500 Block Molalla Avenue Services: Community Meals General Addictions/Substance Use Disorder Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - FREE ON THE OUTSIDE HOUSING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FREE ON THE OUTSIDE
